name: Polish Reuben Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10 3/4 oz each) condensed cream of mushroom soup
2 cans (16 oz each) sauerkraut, rinsed and drained
1 1/2 lb Polish sausage, fully cooked, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine soup, milk, onion, and mustard; blend well.
2. Spread sauerkraut in a greased 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. Top the sauerkraut with uncooked noodles.
4. Spoon the soup mixture evenly over the noodles.
5. Top with sausage slices, then cheese.
6. In a small bowl, combine bread crumbs and melted butter; sprinkle over the top.
7. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
8. Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for 1 hour or until noodles are tender. Garnish as desired.
